description.text: Friendly units using <key>Ambush</key> may ignore distance restrictions from enemies if they are deployed within 6” of this model.
This model gets -1 to hit rolls when shooting.
Enemies that roll to block hits from this model's weapons take 1 extra wound for each unmodified result of 1 that they roll.

If this model has <key>Badlands <key>Hunter</key></key>, enemies taking wounds from it take extra wounds on failed defense rolls of 1-2 from <key>Badlands <key>Hunter</key></key> (instead of only on 1).

This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Badlands <key>Hunter</key></key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
When units where all models have this rule are shot or charged from over 9” away and take hits, those hits count as having <key>AP</key>(-1), to a min. of <key>AP</key>(0).

If all models in this unit have <key>Ballistic Vest</key>, enemy hits always count as having <key>AP</key>(-1) from <key>Ballistic Vest</key> (instead of only when being shot/charged from over 9” away).
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Ballistic Vest</key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 friendly units within 12”, which gets <key>Bane</key> in melee once (next time the effect would apply).
Units where all models have this rule get +1 to morale test rolls.
If a unit where all models have this rule is Shaken at the beginning of the round, roll one die. On a 4+, it stops being Shaken.
If this model has <key>Berserker</key>, it deals extra hits on successful unmodified hit results of 5-6 from <key>Berserker</key> (instead of only on 6).
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Berserker</key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit when attacking, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesn’t apply to newly generated attacks.
If a unit where all models have this rule is Shaken at the beginning of the round, roll one die. On a 4+, it stops being Shaken.
For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit when attacking, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesn’t apply to newly generated attacks.
If this model has <key>Clan Warrior</key>, it gets extra attacks on successful unmodified hit results of 5-6 from <key>Clan Warrior</key> (instead of only on 6).
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Clan Warrior</key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
When this model shoots at enemies over 9” away, it gets +1 to hit rolls.
If this model has <key>Cyber-Eyes</key>, it always gets +1 to hit rolls from <key>Cyber-Eyes</key> (instead of only when shooting over 9” away).
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Cyber-Eyes</key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
This model gets +3” range when shooting and moves +3” when using Charge actions.

Place one marker on this unit at the end of each round if it's on the table. For each marker models with this rule in it get +1 to defense rolls (up to a max. of +2). If this unit is ever Shaken, it loses all its markers.
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key>Defensive Growth</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
<key>Ignores Cover</key>, and against non-<key>Hero</key> units with <key>Tough</key>(3) or more, this weapon gets <key>AP</key>(+2).
When attacking, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).
If this model has <key>Devout</key>, it deals extra hits on successful unmodified hit results of 5-6 from <key>Devout</key> (instead of only on 6).
This model and its unit get <key>Devout Boost</key>.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 friendly units within 12”, which gets <key>Entrenched</key> once (next time the effect would apply).
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key>Flying</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
If a unit where all models have this rule has most of them within 1” of terrain, they get +1 to hit rolls when attacking.
This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key>Grounded Precision</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
If a unit where all models have this rule has most of them within 1” of terrain, enemies get -1 to hit rolls when attacking them.
When units where all models have this rule are shot or charged from over 9” away and take hits, those hits count as having <key>AP</key>(-1), to a min. of <key>AP</key>(0).

This model and up to 3 friendly units picked before the start of the game get <key><key>Guardian</key> Boost</key>. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.
Once per round, units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3” after shooting or being in melee.
If most models in this unit have <key>Guerrilla</key>, they may move by up to 6” from <key>Guerrilla</key> (instead of only 3”).

Once per game, if all models in this unit have this rule, it may be activated even if it had already activated this round (stops being fatigued when activated for the second time). Only up to half of the units in the army with this rule at the beginning of the game (rounding up) may use it in a single round.
When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored. If the wounds were from a spell, then they are ignored on a 4+ instead.
When units where all models have this rule are shot or charged from over 9” away, enemy units get -1 to hit rolls.
If all models in this unit have <key>Machine-Fog</key>, enemies attacking them always get -1 to hit rolls from <key>Machine-Fog</key> (instead of only when being shot/charged from over 9” away).

May only use Advance actions, moving in a straight line, and adding 30” to its total move (even if Shaken). <key>Aircraft</key> ignore all units and terrain when moving and stopping, can’t seize or contest objectives, can’t be charged, and units targeting them get -12” range.

May be set aside before deployment. At the start of any round after the first, may be deployed anywhere over 9” away from enemy units. Players alternate in placing <key>Ambush</key> units, starting with the player that activates next. Units that deploy via <key>Ambush</key> can’t seize or contest objectives on the round they deploy.

Gets X spell tokens at the start of each round, but can’t hold more than 6 tokens at once. At any point before attacking, spend as many tokens as the spell’s value to try casting one or more spells (only one try per spell). Roll one die, on 4+ resolve the effect on a target in line of sight. Models within 18” in line of sight of the caster’s unit may spend any number of spell tokens at the same time before rolling, to give the caster +1/-1 to the roll per token.

Gets X spell tokens at the start of each round, but can’t hold more than 6 tokens at once. At any point before attacking, spend as many tokens as the spell’s value to try casting one or more spells (only one try per spell). Roll one die, on 4+ resolve the effect on a target in line of sight in any direction. Models within 18” in line of sight of the caster’s unit may spend any number of spell tokens at the same time before rolling, to give the caster +1/-1 to the roll per token.
Strikes first with this weapon when charged, and the charging unit gets -1 total <key>Impact</key> rolls per model with <key>Counter</key>.
Strikes first with this weapon when charged, and the charging unit gets -1 total <key>Impact</key> rolls per model with <key>Counter</key> in the two front rows if charging in the front.

May transport up to X models or Heroes with up to <key>Tough</key>(6), and non-Heroes with up to <key>Tough</key>(3) which occupy 3 spaces each. Transports may deploy with units inside, and units may enter/exit by using any move action, but must stay fully within 6” of it when exiting. Units inside/outside transports may not target other units outside/inside transports, but may target the transport itself. When a transport is destroyed, units inside must take a dangerous terrain test, are Shaken, and must be placed fully within 6” of the transport before it’s removed.

Ignores Regeneration, and on unmodified results of 1 to block hits, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.

Place one marker on this unit when it fully destroys an enemy unit. For each marker all models with this rule in this unit get <key>AP</key>(+1) and +1 to defense rolls until the end of the game (up to a max. of +2).
This model and its unit get +1 to hit rolls when charging.
This model and its unit get <key>Sturdy Boost</key>.
If all models in this unit have <key>Sturdy</key>, they always get +1 to defense rolls from <key>Sturdy</key> (instead of only when being shot/charged from over 9” away).
When this unit is activated, pick one effect: until the end of the activation all models with this rule in it either get <key>AP</key>(+1) when attacking, or get +1 to hit rolls when attacking.
When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored.
This model and its unit get <key>Ranged Slayer</key>.
<key>Ignores Cover</key>, and against units where most models have <key>Defense</key> 2+ to <key>Defense</key> 3+, this weapon gets <key>AP</key>(+2).
This model and its unit get <key>Vinci Tech Boost</key>.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18”, which friendly units get +6” range when shooting against once (next time the effect would apply).

Once per activation, pick one enemy unit within 36” and in line of sight of this model and roll one die, on a 4+ place a marker on it. Friendly units may remove markers from their target before rolling to hit to get +X to hit rolls when attacking, where X is the number of removed markers.
This model's ranged weapons get <key>AP</key>(+2) against units where most models have <key>Tough</key>(3) or higher.
If this model has <key>Vinci Tech</key>, it always gets both <key>AP</key>(+1) and +1 to hit rolls from <key>Vinci Tech</key> (instead of having to pick between <key>AP</key>(+1) or +1 to hit rolls).
When this unit is activated, you may place all models with this rule in it anywhere fully within 3” of their position.
When units where all models have this rule are shot or charged from over 9” away, they get +1 to defense rolls.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets <key>Stealth</key> once (next time the effect would apply).
Against units where most models have <key>Defense</key> 5+ to <key>Defense</key> 6+, this weapon gets <key>Blast</key>(+3).
This model and its unit get <key>Wave-Step Boost</key>.

Once per game, when a unit where all models have this rule ends its activation, you may immediately remove it from the table (dropping any objectives it might hold within 1”), and deploy it as if it had <key>Ambush</key> at the beginning of the next round.
If this model has <key>Wave-Step</key>, it may be placed within 6” from <key>Wave-Step</key> (instead of only within 3”).
Once per round, units where all models have this rule may move by up to 3” after shooting or being in melee.

Once per round, when this unit ends its move within 3” of enemy units after being in melee, pick one of them and roll as many dice as models with this rule in this unit, or as many dice as its <key>Tough</key> value (for single-model units). For each 6+ the target takes one wound.
Place one marker on this model when it ignores a wound. When in melee, pick one of its weapons to get +X attacks, where X is the number of markers on it.
For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit in melee, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesn’t apply to newly generated attacks.

Place one marker on this unit when it fully destroys an enemy unit. For each marker all models with this rule in this unit get +1 to hit rolls and +1 to defense rolls until the end of the game (up to a max. of +2).
When attacking the target must re-roll unmodified <key>Defense</key> results of 6.
This model and its unit get <key>Harassing Boost</key>.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18”, which friendly units gets <key>Thrust</key> in melee against once (next time the effect would apply).
If most models in this unit have <key>Harassing</key>, they may move by up to 6” from <key>Harassing</key> (instead of only 3”).

Place one marker on this unit at the end of each round if it's on the table. For each marker models with this rule in it get +1 to hit rolls (up to a max. of +2). If this unit is ever Shaken, it loses all its markers.
This model gets +2” range when shooting and moves +4” when using Charge actions.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets +1 to morale test rolls once (next time the effect would apply).
This model gets <key>Counter</key> in melee.
Ignores Regeneration, and against units where most models have <key>Tough</key>(3) to <key>Tough</key>(9), this weapon gets <key>AP</key>(+4).
This model and its unit get <key>Vale Formation Boost</key>.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18”, which friendly units gets <key>Impact</key>(+1) against once (next time the effect would apply).
If this model has <key>Vale Formation</key>, it gets +4” range when shooting and moves +8” when using Charge actions from <key>Vale Formation</key> (instead of only +2” and +4”).
This model and its unit get +1 to hit rolls when shooting.
When attacking, targets must re-roll unmodified <key>Defense</key> results of 6 when blocking hits from this model's weapons.
Against units where most models have <key>Tough</key>(3) to <key>Tough</key>(9), this weapon gets <key>AP</key>(+4).
This model and its unit get <key>Bestial Boost</key>.

Once per game, during this model's activation, pick one enemy unit within 36” and in line of sight of it, and place X markers on it. When attacking, friendly units may remove markers from their target before rolling to hit to get +Y to hit rolls, where Y is the number of removed markers.
If this model has <key>Bestial</key>, enemies taking hits from it must re-roll successful unmodified defense results of 5-6 from <key>Bestial</key> (instead of only on 6).
This model and its unit get <key>Destroyer Boost</key>.
Once per game, when this unit attacks and all its models have this rule, you may use this rule so that all their weapons get <key>AP</key>(+2).
This model and its unit get <key>Piercing Feat</key>.
Ignores Regeneration, and on unmodified results of 6 to hit that aren't blocked, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets <key>Melee Evasion</key> once (next time the effect would apply).
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one enemy unit within 18”, which gets <key>Unwieldy</key> in melee once (next time the effect would apply).
This model and its unit get +1 to morale test rolls.
If this model has <key>Destroyer</key>, enemies taking wounds from it take extra wounds on failed defense rolls of 1-2 from <key>Destroyer</key> (instead of only on 1).
Strikes last when charging.
Once per activation, when this model moves through enemy units, pick one of them and attack it with this weapon as if it was shooting. This weapon may only be used in this way.
This model gets +6” range when shooting.
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets <key>Guarded</key> once (next time the effect would apply).
When in melee, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets <key>Swift</key> once (next time the effect would apply).
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets Self-Repair Boost once (next time the effect would apply).
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which gets +6” range when shooting once (next time the effect would apply).
Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly unit within 12”, which moves +2” when using Advance actions and +4” when using Rush/Charge actions once (next time the effect would apply).
If a unit where all models have this rule is Shaken at the beginning of the round, roll one die. On a 4+, it stops being Shaken.
For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit when attacking, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesn't apply to newly generated attacks.
Ignores Cover, and against units where most models have Tough(3) to Tough(6), this weapon gets AP(+4).
If this model has Royal Warrior, it gets extra attacks on successful unmodified hit results of 5-6 from Royal Warrior (instead of only on 6).
This model and its unit get Royal Warrior Boost.
